channel.title: Blog on Ray's website
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Ray's website

item.title: Creating a new Website
item.description: I’ve just built a new website using a static site generator (SSG) called Hugo. Given that GitHub Pages enables the publication of websites on GitHub, a platform we are familiar with, I’ve designed a website to function as both a portfolio showcasing my career and an introduction to my background and skills. Specifically, this website includes: An overview of my personal background and skills A dedicated page with my contact information A portfolio showcasing my work A blog While my usual online presence is on another website, I will make an effort to document noteworthy events on this site as well.
